data.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review standard reviewer — important finding.
Finding: required-checks.txt lists check contexts from ci-dso-staged.yml (lint-format, tests, tests-pipefail-strict, llm-review, validate-ci) that are template job names for consuming projects, not this repo's CI workflows. If provision-ruleset.sh is applied to this repo's main branch, it would register non-existent required checks, permanently blocking all PRs.
File: .github/required-checks.txt
Category: correctness
Fix: Either (a) remove consuming-project entries from the file and add a separate template file for consuming projects, or (b) add prominent comments clearly marking the ci-dso-staged entries as 'for consuming projects only, not for this repo' and update provision-ruleset.sh to filter/scope accordingly.
data.title: [required-checks.txt]: ci-dso-staged.yml check contexts included that don't exist in this repo's CI
